title: CGAP MACS Live Dead Separation
author: Adam Hunter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qz5dx86
materials: Count cells and viability using nucleocounter.

steps.title: A single-cell suspension should have been...
steps.instruction: A single-cell suspension should have been prepared previously and cells number and viability assessed using 1:1 trypan blue dilution. A viability percentage below 70-80% usually justifies using this Dead Cell Removal protocol.

steps.title: Remove required number of cells and...
steps.instruction: Remove required number of cells and place in a 15ml Falcon Tube. Required number of cells/total cells = volume required (ml).

steps.title: Prepare 20ml 1X Binding Buffer by...
steps.instruction: Prepare 20ml 1X Binding Buffer by adding 1ml 20X Binding Buffer Stock to 19ml Nuclease Free Water.

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellet in 100ul Dead...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellet in 100ul Dead Cell Removal MicroBeads per 10 7 cells.

steps.title: Mix well and incubate for 15mins at room temperature
steps.instruction: Mix well and incubate for 15mins at room temperature.

steps.title: When 5min of incubation remains, place...
steps.instruction: When 5min of incubation remains, place MS column (if <2x108 cells) or an LS column (if <2x109 cells) on QuadroMACS Magnetic Cell Separator and run 500µl (MS column) or 3ml (LS column) 1X Binding Buffer through the LS column, using a waste 15ml Falcon Tube to catch the effluent.

steps.title: When incubation is finished, add 1ml...
steps.instruction: When incubation is finished, add 1ml (MS column) or 3ml (LS column) 1X Binding Buffer to cells.

steps.title: Run cell suspension through LS column...
steps.instruction: Run cell suspension through LS column on QuadroMACS Magnetic Cell Separator, using a 15ml Falcon Tube to catch effluent as the the live cell fraction.

steps.title: When cells have passed through, run...
steps.instruction: When cells have passed through, run 4 x 500µl (MS column) or 4 x 3ml (LS column) 1X Binding Buffer through LS column on QuadroMACS Magnetic Cell Separator using the same falcon tube to catch effluent as the the live cell fraction.

steps.title: Centrifuge cells at 500g for 5 min at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge cells at 500g for 5 min at 4°C. Resuspend in 0.5-1ml PBS + 0.04% BSA.

steps.title: Resuspend in appropriate volume of 0
steps.instruction: Resuspend in appropriate volume of 0.04% BSA in PBS to run in Chromium.
